subject: Security alert
preview: A high severity vulnerability was found in one of your repositories.
body_html: A security alert was created in one of your repositories.

subject: Your IT Portal Access Expires Tonight
preview: Action required: reclaim access before midnight to avoid ticket reassignment.
body_html:
Hi,

Your account has been inactive for over 90 days and your IT Service Portal access will expire at 11:59 PM tonight.

To prevent disruption, please re-validate your corporate credentials using the secure link below.

Reclaim Portal Access
